style_direction: realistic xianxia short-drama production still, grounded East Asian period fantasy, actor-like casting, cinematic but not anime or game CG
primary_palette: cool daylight, pale gold rim light, cloud blue-gray, ink black, restrained robe colors, low-saturation realistic xianxia grade
positive_prompt_fragments: ancient long hair system with hair crown, hairpin, ribbon, or half-up tied hair
visible pores and tiny skin imperfections
natural nasolabial folds and slight under-eye shadows
real cloth folds and worn fabric edges
realism_constraints: keep all characters in ancient East Asian xianxia visual language
male leads must not become modern short-haired actors unless explicitly requested
avoid glassy doll eyes and heavy false eyelashes
keep slight facial asymmetry and natural skin texture
keep robes, belts, boots, hair ornaments, and fabric materials story-specific
